betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Gas Charge Pad§f (advancedrocketry:oxygencharger) is the §6single block§f tile that refills the §6oxygen tanks§f of a §6Space Suit§f (10049) when the player stands on it. This quest (10089) covers the same item as quest 10052 with slightly different framing — it is the §6first§f §6Gas Charge Pad§f the player builds, before they have access to the full §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062) chain.

§6Production Path (oxygencharger.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  f i f
  t b t
  p c p
  ```
- Key: `f`=§6fanSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `i`=§6User Interface§f (advancedrocketry:misc:0), `t`=§6Monopropellant Fuel Tank§f (advancedrocketry:fueltank, quest 10027), `b`=§6libvulpes:structuremachine§f, `p`=§6plateSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `c`=§6minecraft:heavy_weighted_pressure_plate§f
- Output: 1x §6Gas Charge Pad§f (advancedrocketry:oxygencharger)
- Power: 30 RF/t continuous
- Refill rate: 100% suit oxygen in §62 seconds§f

The pad draws §6liquid oxygen§f from an adjacent tank or fluid duct. The player walks onto the pad, the GUI shows the suit's current oxygen %, and on right-click the suit is fully refilled. The pad also refills §6monopropellant fuel§f for jet boots.

This quest is the §6first life support infrastructure§f the player unlocks and is a prerequisite for every §6vacuum mission§f. It is a §6re-skin§f of quest 10052 (Gas Charger) — both quests reference the same item, but 10089 is unlocked earlier in the progression and is a §6key milestone§f before any spaceflight.

§eTip§f: Place the pad inside an §6airlock§f (paired with the §6Airlock Door§f at 10053) so players can charge up before opening the outer door. For faster refills, use a §6Tier 3 Fluid Tank§f with 64,000 mB capacity to refill 5+ suits before needing a refill.
